name: Liver and Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice the liver to a thickness of 1/4 to 1/2 inch.
2. Cut the liver into serving pieces and place in a 1-quart casserole dish.
3. Mix onions, oil, pepper, and sage in the casserole dish. Cover and microwave on high until the onions are crisp tender (4-6 minutes).
4. Brush the liver with soy sauce.
5. Arrange the thickest pieces of liver at the outside edge of a 9-inch pie plate.
6. Spoon the onions evenly over the liver.
7. Cover tightly and microwave on high for 3 minutes. Turn the pie plate halfway.
8. Continue microwaving until the liver is no longer pink (1-3 minutes). Avoid overcooking.
9. Let stand for 3 minutes before serving. Sprinkle with lemon juice and parsley just before serving.
